heroSubtitle: Take a deep breath. Inquire about a session below, or simply send a note to connect. I look forward to holding space for you.

faqs.question: Where do sessions take place?
faqs.answer: In-person sessions are held at my private shala in Ubud. Virtual sessions take place via Zoom.

faqs.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: I ask for 48 hours notice for a full refund, honoring both your time and mine.
